title: zeltnera exaltata
intro: Zeltnera exaltata, also known as the tall blue-pencilled corydalis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Corydalis genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zeltnera exaltata include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
